name: splice_event_matrix
description: PSI matrix plus sample metadata converted to one or more splicing-derived gene programs

inputs.name: sample_metadata_tsv
inputs.description: Sample metadata table with sample_id and contrast labels

inputs.name: event_metadata_tsv
inputs.description: Optional event metadata table keyed by event_id

parameters.name: signature_name
parameters.help: Optional signature label for metadata/GMT naming; default uses psi_matrix_tsv stem

parameters.name: dataset_label
parameters.help: Optional dataset label for run summaries; default uses input filename

parameters.name: group_column
parameters.help: Optional grouping column for grouped contrasts

parameters.name: min_samples_per_condition
parameters.help: Minimum samples per condition for non-baseline contrasts

parameters.name: min_present_per_condition
parameters.help: Minimum present PSI values per condition

parameters.name: tool_family
parameters.help: Tool-family parser preset for event metadata

parameters.name: event_dup_policy
parameters.help: Duplicate-row collapse policy per canonical event

parameters.name: ambiguous_gene_policy
parameters.help: How ambiguous multi-gene rows are handled

parameters.name: resources_dir
parameters.help: Optional resources directory containing splicing bundle files

parameters.name: resource_policy
parameters.help: Behavior when requested splicing resources are missing

parameters.name: use_reference_bundle
parameters.help: Attempt to use alias, ubiquity, and impact priors when available

parameters.name: event_alias_resource_id
parameters.help: Optional resource id for canonical event alias table

parameters.name: event_ubiquity_resource_id
parameters.help: Optional resource id for event ubiquity prior

parameters.name: event_impact_resource_id
parameters.help: Optional resource id for conservative event impact prior

outputs.name: manifest.tsv
outputs.description: Per-contrast grouped output manifest when multiple programs are emitted

outputs.name: genesets.gmt
outputs.description: Combined directional GMT gene sets when multiple programs are emitted
